steps.title: Use the strength comparison
steps.content: Both animals detect electrical fields, but sharks can detect fields created by water moving through Earth's magnetic field, while crayfish detect fields from household electronics that are many times stronger. The blank must name a difference in scale or strength.

steps.title: Choose the scale word
steps.content: Choice B concerns solidity or determination. Choice C means a collection. Choice D concerns direction or alignment. The word needed here means size, scale, or degree, which fits sensitivities that differ substantially in strength. The answer is A.
